verse.name: v1
verse.lines: My beloved is the most beautiful Among thousands and thousands My beloved is the most beautiful Among thousands and thousands

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: My beloved is the most beautiful Among thousands and thousands

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Yeshu hu oo oo ah, ha aa aa aa, ah aa aa aa Yeshu hu oo oo ah, ha aa aa aa, ah aa aa aa

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: For yours is the kingdom Yours is the power Yours in the glory forever Amen
